commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=487b0dc7a62ca539cf6650cffdb0ed119c3ffd12)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces the diffs viewer toolbar raw SVG string parameter with a `ToolbarIconName` lookup, rebuilds the served viewer runtime, adds a source-inspection test, and inlines a string normalizer for the browser bundle.

Reproducibility: no. not for a live exploit path. The source-level sink is clear on current main, but the linked report and PR context both note that current callers are hardcoded.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for a code fix plus real served-viewer proof; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair while external proof is missing.

target.title: fix(diffs): replace iconMarkup string with ToolbarIconName enum to el…
target.body: ## Summary - Replace `createToolbarButton`'s `iconMarkup: string` parameter with `icon: ToolbarIconName`, a union of 8 known icon name literals - Move SVG generation into a sealed `toolbarIconSvg` map so `innerHTML` only receives compile-time-known strings - Remove 5 old icon functions (`splitIcon`/`unifiedIcon`/`wrapIcon`/`backgroundIcon`/`themeIcon`); callers now pass icon name literals - Rebuild served viewer runtime bundle (`assets/viewer-runtime.js`) to reflect the change - Closes #83918 ## Real behavior proof Behavior addressed: `button.innerHTML = params.iconMarkup` at viewer-client.ts:146 accepted arbitrary strings, creating an XSS sink. The fix replaces `iconMarkup: string` with `icon: ToolbarIconName` union type so `innerHTML` now only reads from the sealed `toolbarIconSvg` map — TypeScript rejects raw strings at the call site. Real environment tested: Linux x86_64, Node 22, openclaw@2d1da5c Exact steps or command run after this patch: ``` node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.ts','utf8');console.log('No iconMarkup: string:',!s.includes('iconMarkup: string'));console.log('innerHTML only via toolbarIconSvg:',s.includes('button.innerHTML = toolbarIconSvg[params.icon]'));console.log('All 8 icons in map:',['split','unified','wrap-on','wrap-off','background-on','background-off','theme-dark','theme-light'].every(n=>s.includes(n+':')||s.includes('\"'+n+'\"')));console.log('No onerror in SVGs:',!s.includes('onerror'));" grep -c iconMarkup extensions/diffs/assets/viewer-runtime.js npx tsc --noEmit --project extensions/diffs/tsconfig.json node -e "const{JSDOM}=require('jsdom');const d=new JSDOM('');const b=d.window.document.createElement('button');b.innerHTML='';console.log('XSS baseline onerror injected:',b.innerHTML.includes('onerror'));" ``` Evidence after fix: terminal output copied from running the above commands on the patched checkout: ``` $ node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync('extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.ts','utf8');console.log('No iconMarkup: string:',!s.includes('iconMarkup: string'));console.log('innerHTML only via toolbarIconSvg:',s.includes('button.innerHTML = toolbarIconSvg[params.icon]'));console.log('All 8 icons in map:',['split','unified','wrap-on','wrap-off','background-on','background-off','theme-dark','theme-light'].every(n=>s.includes(n+':')||s.includes('\"'+n+'\"')));console.log('No onerror in SVGs:',!s.includes('onerror'));" No iconMarkup: string: true innerHTML only via toolbarIconSvg: true All 8 icons in map: true No onerror in SVGs: true $ grep -c iconMarkup extensions/diffs/assets/viewer-runtime.js 0 $ npx tsc --noEmit --project extensions/diffs/tsconfig.json (no output, exit code 0) $ node -e "const{JSDOM}=require('jsdom');const d=new JSDOM('');const b=d.window.document.createElement('button');b.innerHTML='';console.log('XSS baseline onerror injected:',b.innerHTML.includes('onerror'));" XSS baseline onerror injected: true ``` Observed result after fix: `createToolbarButton` now accepts only `ToolbarIconName` literals. The single `innerHTML` at viewer-client.ts:146 reads exclusively from `toolbarIconSvg[params.icon]`. TypeScript rejects arbitrary strings at compile time (tsc exit 0). The rebuilt viewer-runtime.js contains zero `iconMarkup` references (grep count 0). XSS baseline confirms `` would inject via innerHTML — our type-level fix prevents any caller from passing such a string. All 8 icon SVGs contain no event handlers. What was not tested: Live browser rendering of the diff viewer toolbar with the new icon system (requires running `openclaw gateway` with the diffs plugin). Interactive click-to-toggle behavior of toolbar buttons.
target.author: tanshanshan
